settings.title: Size Guide
settings.bullet_1: Stand naturally and measure around your hips at the widest point, where your body is fullest.
settings.bullet_2: Keep the measuring tape snug but not tight, and make sure it's level all the way around.
settings.bullet_3: For best accuracy, measure directly on your body or over thin clothing, and measure twice to be sure.
settings.note_text: If you come between the two sizes, choose the small one.
